opening_line: Automated report: unidentified individual at main entrance. Not scanning key fob. Standing motionless facing interior camera.
notes_for_player: CAM 01 — Lobby. Subject has no visible facial features. Do not admit.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Main revolving door. Interior side. Glass reflects but subject does not.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Male-presenting. Wet coat. Head orientation fixed on camera lens.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Present for six minutes. Prior attempts to hail produced no response.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Feed already flagged. Confirm visually before clearance.
